 * Handles:

useEffect(()=>{if(!isAuth||!user)return;const token=localStorage.getItem('accessToken');const socket=io(SOCKET_URL,{auth:{token},transports:['websocket','polling'],reconnectionDelay:2000});socketRef.current=socket;socket.emit('join_room',"user_".concat(user.id));socket.on('new_message',msg=>{setUnreadMessages(c=>c+1);addToast("\uD83D\uDCAC New message from ".concat(msg.sender_name||'someone'),'info');});socket.on('job_update',job=>{addToast("\uD83D\uDCCB Job \"".concat(job.title,"\" status: ").concat(job.status),'success');});socket.on('payment_received',p=>{addToast("\uD83D\uDCB0 Payment \u20B9".concat(p.amount," received!"),'success');});socket.on('new_application',data=>{addToast("\uD83D\uDC77 New application for \"".concat(data.job_title,"\""),'info');});socket.on('dispute_update',d=>{addToast("\u26A0\uFE0F Dispute update: ".concat(d.status),'warning');});return()=>{socket.disconnect();socketRef.current=null;};},[isAuth,user,addToast]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(NotificationContext.Provider,{value:{unreadMessages,setUnreadMessages,toasts,addToast,removeToast,socket:socketRef.current},children:children});};export const useNotification=()=>{const ctx=useContext(NotificationContext);if(!ctx)throw new Error('useNotification must be used within NotificationProvider');return ctx;};
